positive: A mystical and symmetrical composition featuring a stylized crescent moon cradling glowing tropical flora and deep-sea bioluminescent elements. The art style is hyper-detailed neo-art nouveau mixed with cosmic geometric symmetry. Use a color palette dominated by deep indigo, vibrant teal, ethereal gold, and contrasting glowing lavender. The composition must be centered, designed as a standalone, high-contrast silhouette print suitable for apparel. Strong negative space, clean lines, perfect symmetry, intricate linework, vector quality, ultra-detailed.
negative: blurry, deformed, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, artifacts, low detail, grain, poorly drawn, copyright, trademark, messy, collage, messy lines
